heading: Millaa Millaa vs Millbank — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Millaa Millaa, Queensland and Millbank, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Millaa Millaa has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Millbank (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Millaa Millaa or Millbank safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Millaa Millaa has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Millbank scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Millaa Millaa scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Millbank scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Millaa Millaa or Millbank?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Millaa Millaa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
